Effects Rainbow Runtz delivers an uplifting, mood-lifting onset that pairs cerebral euphoria with a comfortable body baseline. The high feels social and pleasant, ideal for daytime use, group settings, or any moment that benefits from a steady, flavor-led hybrid that doesn't tip too far in either direction.
